task: Advanced high-value task: Ore Grade Reconciliation Block Fault Isolation Worksheet. Scenario: a platform owner wants to convert ambiguous measurements into deterministic review actions for ore grade reconciliation block. Embedded packet: Records: R1 model_grade_pct=69 plant_grade_pct=106 tonnes=6; R2 model_grade_pct=78 plant_grade_pct=102 tonnes=9; R3 model_grade_pct=64 plant_grade_pct=117 tonnes=5. Remediation options: O1 changes model_grade_pct by -12% cost=90500; O2 changes plant_grade_pct by -18% cost=104900; O3 changes tonnes by -25% cost=63100; max_budget=130800. Rules and constraints: absolute grade variance>12% requires geology review; metal impact=tonnes*(plant-model); missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: perform a sensitivity check around the governing threshold and identify records whose classification is unstable. Deliver ore_reconcile_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
